name: Sakurama Kosaki | Beast Pink Netori
description:
"I can't believe I have to sleep with a man like you...but this is just for the sake of peace, so let's just get this over with."

Well that's the trio done. I'm not gonna do the yellow girl since she's more of a psychotic yandere than ntr. Now I wonder should I move onto the party ntr (the girls below) or another artist.

All characters in the story are 18 or above including yourself.

Like usual next two bots will be fluff to balance wholesome and ntr. Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
